roa.docketEntryComment: PD MOTION TO DECLARE CONFLICT ASSIGNMENT OF CONFLICT COUNSEL FILED
/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED, NO CONTEMPT,/BAIL: 25,000/X: FUTURE COURT DATE IS CONFIRMED,/CONTD: TO SET 3455PC & STATUS OF M99 #21008855/DOP/

/CAL:TO SET 3455PC (PRCS)/X:ORAL MOTION FOR RELEASE IS GRANTED BY THE COURT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/WEAP/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO ABIDEBY ANY STAY AWAY ORDER/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONT/DOP/
/CAL: APD PC 3455 MOTION BEFORE JUDGE DARWIN/PD/WIAPRCS/CTORD: PRCS IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/SHER/BAIL: 50,000/M09/TBH: 21006995/CONTD: TRAILING#21006995/DOP/CONTD: TO SET 3455PC (PRCS)/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET APD 3455PC (PRCS)/MO PC 1385:(TYPE IN THE REASON FOR DISMISSAL) /
/CAL:ADDRESS CUSTODY STATUS/NP/X:DEFENDANT IS IN CUSTODY OUT-OF-COUNTY/X:THE COURT CONFIRMS THE FUTURE DATE/DOP/
/CAL: STATUS OF M99, #21008855/OR/CONTD: ADDRESS CUSTODY STATUS/DOP/
/CAL: TO DECLARE A CONFLICT/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'SOFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: EAN VIZZI /X: FUTURE DATES ARE CONFIRME
/CAL:APD 3455PC MOTION/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 9/TRANS 9:FORTHWITH FOR AN ON APD 3455PC MOTION & TO JOIN #21006995 AT 1:30PM/
